languages.text: "Вы меня утомили. Разбирайтесь сами и больше не смейте меня беспокоить по пустякам".
"You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."
languages.original_text: "Вы меня утомили. Разбирайтесь сами и больше не смейте меня беспокоить по пустякам".

traits.locale_text: "You have exhausted me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."
"You have exhausted me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."
"You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."
"You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."
"You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."
"You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

languages.text: "Ihr langweilt mich. Regelt die Angelegenheit und wagt es nicht, mich noch einmal damit zu behelligen."
languages.original_text: "You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr langweilt mich. Regelt die Angelegenheit und wagt es nicht, mich noch einmal damit zu behelligen."

languages.text: « Vous m'épuisez. Réglez vos histoires entre vous, et ne vous avisez plus jamais de me déranger pour de pareilles broutilles. »
languages.original_text: "You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

traits.locale_text: « Vous m'épuisez. Réglez vos histoires entre vous, et ne vous avisez plus jamais de me déranger pour de pareilles broutilles. »

languages.text: “你们真让我头疼。自己解决去，以后少拿这种小事来烦我。”
languages.original_text: "You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

traits.locale_text: “你们真让我头疼。自己解决去，以后少拿这种小事来烦我。”

languages.text: «Están agotando mi paciencia. Arreglen esto entre ustedes y no vuelvan a importunarme con estas tonterías».
languages.original_text: "You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

traits.locale_text: «Están agotando mi paciencia. Arreglen esto entre ustedes y no vuelvan a importunarme con estas tonterías».

languages.text: 「私を疲れさせる気か。自分たちで解決して、もう二度とこんなつまらないことで私を邪魔しないで」。
languages.original_text: "You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

languages.text: "Beni tüketiyorsunuz. Bunu kendi aranızda halledin ve bir daha beni böyle incir çekirdeğini doldurmayacak meselelerle rahatsız etmeyin."
languages.original_text: "You're exhausting me. Sort this out yourselves and do not dare disturb me with such trifles again."

traits.locale_text: "Beni tüketiyorsunuz. Bunu kendi aranızda halledin ve bir daha beni böyle incir çekirdeğini doldurmayacak meselelerle rahatsız etmeyin."
